{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320162415278FEDAA3DE171C9C6A2"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7239155965400335160","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽然字数短，但是内容很完整，我原来就喜欢看纸质的短篇，但是番茄这种短篇合集还是挺少的，大大加油，引领新风潮。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1685497510,"group_id":"7237787123980438543","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+JK/1wHPGfCSzbI32YRBm5/Pfuex3M7ly5JELE23lOo","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/92b667afd3ba4b31a95959b243d96f7d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533619&x-signature=ql284zN%2BRGoc9ZR8XLjy0SK1OvQ%3D","user_id":"1513348906877104","user_name":"慈山的叶云池"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1513348906877104","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1717587426,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7237787123980438543","book_info":{"abstract":"（尖叫）（扭曲）（阴暗的爬行） （爬行）（扭动）（阴暗地蠕动）（翻滚）（激烈地爬动）（扭曲）（痉挛）（嘶吼）（蠕动）（阴森的低吼）（爬行）（分裂）（走上岸）（扭动）（痉挛）（蠕动）（扭曲的行走）（不分对象攻击）
作者已疯，谁都别管。
这本书里面杂七杂八的都有，全是我被生活压弯了腰，转行清水文产出的……额，嗯……不知道怎么形容，反正就是这样那样，嗯，你们懂得。
每个章节的标题都是男女主人设，大家选择性阅读，因为这是短篇合集，里面内容都不鸟，跨度很大。
我能日万，产量高，内容丰富，居然赚不到一分钱，哭死。
这部作品就放在这里，可能会变成水仙文。
如果有人看了，记得给我发条私信，我看到了就回。
主要是因为一个人在奋斗的路上太寂寞，但会坚持到底的。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ode7706f3800f6f9ced17b1a6a5eb391c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"乙巳丰年","author_id":"","book_id":"7237787123980438543","book_name":"人哪有不发疯的呢","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8f8e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":749,"name":"青春甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=749&name=青春甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":468,"name":"冰山","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=468&name=冰山&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7237787195250049569","read_count":"2","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"113322"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"33","tags":"青春甜宠,现代言情,校园,冰山","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ode7706f3800f6f9ced17b1a6a5eb391c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779179055&x-signature=mkV9dnKo1NVq1wEuMufQ%2F4WAVwk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2395173396422542","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.578235e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320162415278FEDAA3DE171C9C6A2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":191},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1685498560,"author_reply_time":1685498579,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg"
